content.full_text:
April 1, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
The Travelers Business Center
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

RE: REQUEST FOR WRITTEN ADVICE

Gentlepersons:

I was recently given advice over the phone by Wayne Imberi which I request in writing.

The question was: When a Form 721 filer purchases a new car, must the trade-in allowance on his/her old car be reported as a "sale," resulting in reportable income to the filer, or is the trade-in merely partial consideration for the new car and thus not reportable? We were advised that it was a "sale," which seems a bit ludicrous to us.

Please give us your advice in writing on this question at your earliest opportunity.

Thank you for your assistance.

Very truly yours,

John Torrance
City Attorney

JT:ldc

cc: City Council
    City Manager
